payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped reddish-brown wooden dining chair with a light beige upholstered seat cushion; turned front leg and horizontal stretcher are visible, crop is slightly blurred and the chair is cut off by the image border — approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
